description: Literature the Phase-R agent may WebFetch. Curated for noise-robust neural time-series modelling and identifiable inverse problems relevant to the connectome-gnn measurement-noise objective. Add new URLs only after human review — the agent may propose additions to this file but should not apply them autonomously.

themes_covered: LFADS: latent dynamical system from noisy neural spiking
Kalman-filter neural extensions for noisy state recovery
Consistency regularization and self-ensembling for time series
Denoising autoencoders on neural voltage traces
Teacher-forcing schedules for recurrent training (Williams, Bengio scheduled sampling)
Contrastive learning for temporal representations (SimCLR-style on trajectories)
notes.policy: Agent may WebFetch URLs in the list. Outside URLs require human approval — Phase R should request an addition via a comment in research_block_NN.md rather than proposing inline.
